goal.answer: Start the full Laravel + Vite development stack so the user can view the Tesla giveaway website locally in their browser.

payload.plain: Start the full Laravel + Vite development stack so the user can view the Tesla giveaway website locally in their browser.

criteria.answer:
Laravel dev server (php artisan serve) is running and serving the home page on localhost:8000
Vite dev server (npm run dev) is running alongside, providing hot-reloading for CSS/JS assets
The page renders correctly in a browser — all Tesla car images, navigation links, and interactive elements load
The existing index.html static backup in the repo root is preserved (not deleted) as a fallback

plain: Laravel dev server (php artisan serve) is running and serving the home page on localhost:8000
Vite dev server (npm run dev) is running alongside, providing hot-reloading for CSS/JS assets
The page renders correctly in a browser — all Tesla car images, navigation links, and interactive elements load
The existing index.html static backup in the repo root is preserved (not deleted) as a fallback

constraints.answer: Must use the existing Laravel project structure — no new framework or dependencies, Must preserve all existing files (index.html, index_1.html, index_2.html), Must use the existing composer.json dev script for running the concurrent stack

plain: Must use the existing Laravel project structure — no new framework or dependencies
Must preserve all existing files (index.html, index_1.html, index_2.html)
Must use the existing composer.json dev script for running the concurrent stack

phaseSnapshots.name: Setup and Launch
phaseSnapshots.goal: Install remaining npm deps, install composer deps if needed, then run the full dev stack

steps.description: Ensure prerequisites are met — check for PHP, Composer, npm/node availability
Install npm dependencies (npm install) — node_modules is currently missing

verification.command: ls node_modules/.package-lock.json 2>/dev/null || npm install && ls node_modules

steps.description: Run the full dev stack using composer dev script: php artisan serve + php artisan queue:listen + php artisan pail + npm run dev (via concurrently)

verification.command: curl -s -o /dev/null -w %{http_code} http://localhost:8000 | grep -q 200 || echo 'Check server startup'; ps aux | grep -q 'php artisan serve'

assumptions.answer: PHP 8.3+ and Composer are available on the system (vendor/ already exists); npm and npx are available for running Vite and concurrently; The composer.json dev script is the canonical way to start the dev environment; No database migration is needed — the home page is a static view (no DB queries); The existing .env APP_URL=http://infinityxcapital.test will be overridden for local dev
